artworks.title: Nightwatch
artworks.caption: Cheek to cheek, both of them asleep. The cat will not move all night, and that is the whole arrangement.

artworks.title: The Mouth That Keeps Me
artworks.caption: Somebody is curled up inside the open mouth. Not swallowed. Kept.

artworks.title: There Is a Theory
artworks.caption: A head on a shoulder and hair over everything. She has done this before, and will do it again tomorrow.

artworks.title: Before the Storm
artworks.caption: I did lost a piece of myself and mistook every shore for the way back home.

artworks.title: One Line, Two People
artworks.caption: Two faces drawn without the pen leaving the paper. There is no point along it where one of them ends.

artworks.title: The Red Hour
artworks.caption: Grey ground, grey people, a moon with a bite taken out of it. The only colour is the flower the small one is holding.

artworks.title: The Quiet After
artworks.caption: Two people sitting with their backs to you. Whatever it was, it is finished now.

artworks.title: Synthetic Reverie
artworks.caption: Orange laid over blue on a sketchbook page. Faces put together out of whatever was on the desk.

artworks.title: The Cat Knew First
artworks.caption: The cat is watching something above the frame. The face underneath has come apart trying to see it too.

artworks.title: We Grew Into the Tree
artworks.caption: Two people holding on long enough to become the trunk. The roots arrived afterwards.

artworks.title: The Weather Was Only Above Us
artworks.caption: All that weather in the top half. Down at the bottom, two people and a sunflower, not looking up.

artworks.title: Sitting With It
artworks.caption: Cross-legged, head tipped back, eyes shut. Not solving anything — just staying in the room.

artworks.title: Paper Garden
artworks.caption: Leaves with corners on them. Cut and folded rather than grown, and none of it needs watering.

artworks.title: What the Hands Remember
artworks.caption: Two hands with a spiral drawn into each palm. Whatever they held went round, and came back round.

artworks.title: Sleeping Through the Good Part
artworks.caption: Asleep in all that yellow, with the sunflower right there beside her, unseen.
